subject: Re: No averages created during processing
body:
I found that averages are calculated when I checked the box  'Aligned 
stack, collapse every1 frame

this also fixed export for IMOD which without averages gave an error in not 
finding movies

Tracy

On Wednesday, April 20, 2022 at 1:56:10 PM UTC-4 Tracy Nixon wrote:

> We are also having this issue.
>
> Tracy Nixon
>
> On Friday, February 25, 2022 at 5:25:31 AM UTC-5 julien....@gmail.com 
> wrote:
>
>> Dear Warp users,
>>
>> Wen I process in Warp my frames of a tilt serie the power spectrums are 
>> well generated but it happens that no average is generated.
>>
>> In the "real space" section  "no motion data available yet" is displayed 
>> and no average folder is created on my computer. Both "Motion" option and 
>> "Output - average" are checked..
>>
>> Did that happen to someone of you ? What is the trick to fix this ?
>>
>> Thanks,
>> Best regards,
>>
>> Julien Maufront
>>
>
